params.isPrivate: Whether this strategy execution is private
params.strategyUri: If public mode, the 0G Storage URI; if private, pass empty string

commitStrategy(bytes32,string,bool).notice: Commit a strategy. In private mode, only the hash is stored.

getAgentStrategies(address).notice: Get all strategy commitment hashes for an agent.

getStrategy(bytes32).notice: Get a strategy record by its commitment hash.

linkExecution(bytes32,string).notice: Link an executed Uniswap transaction to a strategy commitment.

revealStrategy(bytes32,string).notice: Reveal a private strategy by providing its URI (optional, after execution).
